channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Platinum 7D Nightclub in Nakuru Closes After 14 Years Due to Tough Economy and High Taxes
item.description: Kenyans on social media are sharing mixed feelings after Platinum 7D, one of the most popular nightclubs in Nakuru, officially closed its doors after operating for 14 solid years. The club, which was ...

item.title: Standard Bank invites township SMEs to enter R1 million pitch challenge
item.description: Standard Bank has opened applications for its Kasi SME Pitch Challenge, aimed at supporting township entrepreneurs across South Africa. Small business owners have until May 22 to apply for the provinc...

item.title: Plaid Cymru becomes largest party in Welsh Senedd, ending Labour dominance
item.description: In a historic shift, Plaid Cymru has emerged as the largest party in the Welsh Senedd elections, ending more than a century of Labour governance in Wales. The party secured 43 seats, followed by Refor...

item.title: Sarah Ferguson and P. Diddy: Long-standing personal and financial connections revealed alongside Royal controversies
item.description: Recent revelations detail the extensive personal and financial entanglements of Sarah Ferguson, Duchess of York, with prominent figures such as P. Diddy and the late Jeffrey Epstein. Evidence suggests...

item.title: South Africa conducts contact tracing after hantavirus cases linked to MV Hondius
item.description: South African health authorities are actively tracing individuals who may have been exposed to a hantavirus outbreak connected to the MV Hondius expedition cruise ship. The outbreak has resulted in ei...

item.title: Russia marks Victory Day amid Ukraine conflict and domestic tensions
item.description: This year, Russia’s annual Victory Day celebrations in Red Square are markedly subdued, overshadowed by the ongoing war in Ukraine and rising domestic discontent. A unilateral ceasefire announced by R...

item.title: Drug War Victims Request Duterte's Continued Detention at ICC Ahead of Trial
item.description: Families of victims from the Philippines' war on drugs are urging the International Criminal Court (ICC) to keep former President Rodrigo Duterte in detention as he faces trial for crimes against huma...

item.title: Uncertainty grows over Australian cricket contracts as BBL privatisation delays continue
item.description: Australian cricket is facing a potential contract crisis, as several nationally-contracted players appear reluctant to commit to long-term international deals. This follows the temporary suspension of...

item.title: New Report Highlights the Challenges and Strain on Canadian Caregivers
item.description: A recent report from the Canadian Centre for Caregiving Excellence (CCCE) reveals that caregivers across Canada are facing severe financial, emotional, and physical pressures. Surveying over 2,200 unp...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to temporary three-day ceasefire and prisoner exchange
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a temporary three-day ceasefire and a prisoner swap, marking a brief pause in hostilities. The ceasefire, running from 9 ...

item.title: Several Ebonyi APC Members Resign Following Political Consensus Decisions
item.description: Some prominent politicians and business people for Ebonyi State don resign their membership from the ruling All Progressives Congress (APC) following a consensus arrangement wey Governor Francis Nwifu...

item.title: Kenyans Mourn Constance Githinji After Tragic Fall in Nairobi
item.description: Kenyans are in deep mourning following the tragic death of 22-year-old Muran’ga University student, Constance Mwende Githinji. She fell from an Airbnb in Kileleshwa, Nairobi, under circumstances curre...

item.title: Concerns that BEE policies may be limiting job creation and economic growth
item.description: In this opinion piece, Andrew Bateman argues that Black Economic Empowerment (BEE), while rooted in constitutional goals of redress and equality, is not delivering meaningful benefits to the majority ...

item.title: Vijay's Swearing-In Date Remains Uncertain as Tamil Nadu Prepares for First Coalition Government
item.description: The political scenario in Tamil Nadu is witnessing a rare moment as the state gears up for its first coalition government. Actor-turned-politician Vijay's swearing-in as Chief Minister has become a ma...

item.title: Sporting Lagos clinch first NNL title on goal difference despite defeat
item.description: Sporting Lagos don make history as dem top the Super 4 tournament to win the 2025/26 Nigeria National League (NNL) title, even after dem lose 1-0 to Inter Lagos on Friday at Remo Stars stadium for Ike...

item.title: Australia’s EV boom and the push for better public charging infrastructure
item.description: Australia is experiencing a significant surge in electric vehicle (EV) sales, with nearly 25,000 units sold in March 2026, representing a 69.6% increase from the same month last year. While home charg...

item.title: Finance Bill 2026 proposes KRA access to personal data to assess taxes
item.description: The National Treasury in Kenya is pushing amendments under the Draft Finance Bill 2026 that would give the Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) more authority to access personal data when assessing individua...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari becomes first BJP Chief Minister of West Bengal after Assembly victory
item.description: Suvendu Adhikari, senior leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party, formally took oath as the Chief Minister of West Bengal on Saturday, becoming the first BJP leader to hold this position in the state. Hi...

item.title: Report reveals global network of over 80 companies linked to Herbert Wigwe
item.description: This investigation carry come out deeper picture of the late Access Holdings CEO, Herbert Wigwe, and the wide business network wey he build quietly across the world. According to records from differen...

item.title: Top Logistics Companies Operating in Kenya and How to Reach Them
item.description: Kenya has a diverse logistics sector, ranging from big multinational corporations to local courier services and startups. Some of the top companies include Aeromarine Capital Group, DHL Global Logisti...
